productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Ankle Shoes
description: Style NoteCasual mid-top styling on a formal cut, this shoe from U.S. Polo Association showcases the brand's commitment to quality and innovation. This shoe can either be worn with your casual ensembles - style it with a plaid shirt, a monochrome tee and denims, or dress it up for semi-formal occasions with fitted, clean-look denims, a crisp shirt and a blazer!Product DetailsBrown derby shoe with central lace-ups Upper stitched to the outsoleTextured TPU outsole with branded groove on the midfoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
